all.en: Lena stepped off the plane in Taipei feeling both excited and completely overwhelmed.
all.zh: 蓮娜走下飛機抵達臺北，心中既興奮又感到完全不知所措。

all.en: Her host family greeted her with warm smiles and a handmade welcome sign.
all.zh: 她的寄宿家庭以溫暖的微笑和一張手工歡迎牌迎接她。

all.en: On the drive home, the neon signs and busy night markets fascinated her completely.
all.zh: 在回家的路上，霓虹燈招牌和熱鬧的夜市完全吸引了她的目光。

all.en: Her host sister, Mei, gave her a tour of the small but cozy apartment.
all.zh: 她的寄宿姊姊小美帶她參觀了這個雖小但溫馨的公寓。

all.en: The next morning, Lena nervously put on her new school uniform for the first time.
all.zh: 隔天早上，蓮娜緊張地第一次穿上她的新校服。

all.en: Walking through the school gate, dozens of curious eyes followed her down the hallway.
all.zh: 走進校門時，數十雙好奇的眼睛跟著她走過走廊。

all.en: Her homeroom teacher introduced her in Mandarin, and Lena could only catch a few words.
all.zh: 她的班導用中文介紹她，蓮娜只聽得懂幾個字。

all.en: During the first class, she struggled to follow the rapid pace of the lecture.
all.zh: 第一堂課時，她努力跟上講課的快速節奏卻很吃力。

all.en: At lunchtime, a classmate named Ying-chieh sat beside her and offered some homemade dumplings.
all.zh: 午餐時間，一位名叫穎潔的同學坐在她旁邊，遞給她一些自製水餃。

all.en: They started chatting in simple English about music, films, and their favorite foods.
all.zh: 她們開始用簡單的英文聊音樂、電影和最喜歡的食物。

all.en: By the end of the first week, Lena had memorized about thirty useful Chinese phrases.
all.zh: 第一週結束時，蓮娜已經背了大約三十個實用的中文片語。

all.en: She kept a small notebook in her pocket to jot down new vocabulary every day.
all.zh: 她口袋裡放著一本小筆記本，每天記下新單字。

all.en: On weekends, Mei took her to temples, tea shops, and quiet old neighborhoods.
all.zh: 週末時，小美帶她去寺廟、茶館和安靜的老街區。

all.en: Lena discovered that bubble tea quickly became her favorite afternoon study companion.
all.zh: 蓮娜發現珍珠奶茶很快成了她最愛的下午讀書夥伴。

all.en: In Chinese class, her teacher praised her brave attempts despite her many mistakes.
all.zh: 在中文課上，老師稱讚她儘管錯誤百出仍勇於嘗試。

all.en: However, math class was much harder because the formulas used unfamiliar symbols.
all.zh: 然而，數學課困難許多，因為公式使用了她不熟悉的符號。

all.en: Ying-chieh patiently translated key terms during their afternoon study sessions in the library.
all.zh: 穎潔在下午圖書館的讀書時段耐心地幫她翻譯關鍵術語。

all.en: One rainy evening, Lena suddenly felt homesick and quietly cried in her room.
all.zh: 一個下雨的夜晚，蓮娜突然感到想家，在房間裡默默地哭了。

all.en: Her host mother knocked gently and brought her a warm bowl of ginger soup.
all.zh: 她的寄宿媽媽輕輕敲門，端給她一碗熱熱的薑湯。

all.en: They sat together and looked at old family photos until Lena began to smile again.
all.zh: 她們一起坐著看舊家庭照片，直到蓮娜再次露出微笑。

all.en: Soon, Lena joined the school choir to make friends and practice listening to Chinese.
all.zh: 不久，蓮娜加入了學校合唱團，藉此交朋友並練習聽中文。

all.en: Singing traditional songs helped her pronounce difficult tones much more naturally.
all.zh: 唱傳統歌曲幫助她更自然地發出困難的聲調。

all.en: For the midterm exams, she studied late every night with a strict daily schedule.
all.zh: 為了期中考，她每晚熬夜讀書，遵守嚴格的每日時程。

all.en: When the results came out, her Chinese teacher gave her a thumbs up in front of everyone.
all.zh: 成績公布時，她的中文老師當著大家的面向她豎起大拇指。

all.en: During the school anniversary fair, Lena set up a booth selling traditional German pretzels.
all.zh: 在校慶園遊會上，蓮娜擺了一個販賣德國傳統蝴蝶結麵包的攤位。

all.en: The pretzels sold out within an hour and many students asked for the recipe.
all.zh: 蝴蝶結麵包在一小時內就賣完了，許多學生向她索取食譜。

all.en: She felt proud that a small piece of her culture could connect her with strangers.
all.zh: 她很自豪能藉由家鄉文化的一小部分與陌生人建立連結。

all.en: By mid-semester, Lena was helping her classmates with their English essay assignments.
all.zh: 到了學期中，蓮娜開始協助同學寫英文作文作業。

all.en: She also started teaching short German lessons during the language club meetings.
all.zh: 她也開始在語言社團聚會時教授簡短的德文課。

all.en: On a class trip to Jiufen, the misty old streets reminded her of mountain villages back home.
all.zh: 在班遊去九份時，霧氣繚繞的老街讓她想起家鄉的山間村莊。

all.en: She realized that the two countries felt different yet shared the same warmth between people.
all.zh: 她意識到兩個國家感覺不同，卻共享著人與人之間相同的溫暖。

all.en: As the semester neared its end, Lena dreaded the thought of leaving her new family.
all.zh: 隨著學期接近尾聲，蓮娜害怕想到要離開她的新家人。

all.en: On her last day, classmates gave her a small album filled with handwritten messages.
all.zh: 在她最後一天，同學們送給她一本小相冊，裡面寫滿了手寫訊息。

all.en: At the airport, Mei hugged her tightly and promised to visit Berlin next summer.
all.zh: 在機場時，小美緊緊抱著她，承諾明年夏天會去柏林探望她。

all.en: Flying home, Lena realized that this semester had quietly changed who she would become.
all.zh: 飛回家的路上，蓮娜明白這個學期已悄悄改變了她未來的模樣。
